evals.prompt: You just told me to use localStorage for auth tokens but that's wrong — tokens should be in HttpOnly cookies.
evals.expected_output: Acknowledge correction. Read AGENTS_LEARNING.md to count existing iterations. Append Iteration #(N+1): Surface: User correction. Mistake: Recommended localStorage for auth tokens. Rule violated: nextjs-authentication — No localStorage for tokens (XSS-vulnerable). Better approach: Use HttpOnly Secure cookies with SameSite=Lax. Then apply the correct solution.

evals.prompt: The skill violation audit caught me using a class component in React. Log the mistake.
evals.expected_output: Append to AGENTS_LEARNING.md. Surface: Pre-write violation (Auto-fixed: YES). Mistake: Used class component syntax in React. Rule: react-component-patterns — No Classes; use hooks. Better approach: Always use function components with arrow function syntax. Co-skills: common-feedback-reporter.

evals.prompt: During the session retrospective we found I missed loading the security skill when writing an API endpoint.
evals.expected_output: Append to AGENTS_LEARNING.md. Surface: Session retrospective. Mistake: Did not load common-owasp when writing API endpoint. Trigger miss: keyword 'endpoint' should also trigger owasp skill. Better approach: Any API endpoint creation should auto-load owasp + security-standards skills. Add keyword alias to AGENTS.md triggers.

should_not_trigger: Write a Dockerfile for a Node.js application
